source.title: AgentWallet Skill — frames.ag
source.excerpt: AgentWallet provides server wallets for AI agents. Base URL: https://frames.ag/api/v1. EVM (Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Gnosis) and Solana. Policy-controlled, server-side signing.

source.title: AgentWallet Skill — frames.ag
source.excerpt: AgentWallet provides server wallets for AI agents. Base URL: https://frames.ag/api/v1. EVM (Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Gnosis) and Solana. Policy-controlled, server-side signing.

source.title: AgentWallet Skill — frames.ag
source.excerpt: AgentWallet provides server wallets for AI agents. Base URL: https://frames.ag/api/v1. EVM (Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Gnosis) and Solana. Policy-controlled, server-side signing.

payload.value: Base (eip155:8453), Ethereum (eip155:1), Optimism (eip155:10), Polygon (eip155:137), Arbitrum (eip155:42161), BNB Smart Chain (eip155:56), Gnosis (eip155:100), Sepolia, Base Sepolia, Solana (mainnet + devnet)

source.title: AgentWallet Skill — frames.ag
source.excerpt: AgentWallet provides server wallets for AI agents. Base URL: https://frames.ag/api/v1. EVM (Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Gnosis) and Solana. Policy-controlled, server-side signing.

payload.value: x402 (v1 + v2), MPP (Machine Payments Protocol / Tempo)

source.title: AgentWallet Skill — frames.ag
source.excerpt: AgentWallet provides server wallets for AI agents. Base URL: https://frames.ag/api/v1. EVM (Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Gnosis) and Solana. Policy-controlled, server-side signing.

source.title: AgentWallet Skill — frames.ag
source.excerpt: AgentWallet provides server wallets for AI agents. Base URL: https://frames.ag/api/v1. EVM (Base, Ethereum, Optimism, Polygon, Arbitrum, BSC, Gnosis) and Solana. Policy-controlled, server-side signing.

payload.value:
x402/fetch — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/x402/fetch — One-step payment proxy: detects 402, signs, retries automatically
x402/pay — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/x402/pay — Manual x402 payment signing endpoint
mpp/pay — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/mpp/pay — Manual MPP (Tempo) payment signing
transfer — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/transfer — EVM USDC/ETH transfer
transfer-solana — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/transfer-solana — Solana SOL/USDC transfer
contract-call — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/contract-call — EVM or Solana program call
sign-message — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/actions/sign-message — Sign arbitrary message
balances — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/balances — Get wallet balances
activity — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/activity — Wallet event history
policy — https://frames.ag/api/wallets/{user}/policy — Get/update spending policy

payload.value:
twitter — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/twitter — Full Twitter/X API: users, tweets, search, communities, spaces, trends (26 endpoints, $0.005–$0.02)
ai-gen — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/ai-gen — AI image/video/audio/3D generation via 15+ models ($0.01+)
exa — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/exa — Semantic web search, find-similar, contents, AI answer ($0.002–$0.01)
jupiter — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/jupiter — Solana swap, price, tokens, portfolio ($0.002–$0.01)
agentmail — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/agentmail — Agent email: create inbox, send, list messages/threads ($0.005–$0.01)
coingecko — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/coingecko — Crypto prices, market data, trending, search ($0.002–$0.005)
near-intents — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/near-intents — Cross-chain swap quote via NEAR 1Click ($0.01)
wordspace — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/wordspace — AI agent loop with sandboxed execution ($2)
openrouter — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/openrouter — 300+ LLM models text generation (free)
test — https://registry.frames.ag/api/service/test — x402 payment flow test on testnets ($0.001)

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

payload.value: Base (eip155:8453), Ethereum (eip155:1), Optimism (eip155:10), Polygon (eip155:137), Arbitrum (eip155:42161), BNB Smart Chain (eip155:56), Solana mainnet, Solana devnet, Stellar (in SDK); fiat facilitators possible

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

payload.value: x402 v1, x402 v2 (HTTP 402-based); CAIP-2 network IDs; EIP-3009 (EVM exact scheme); SPL transfer (Solana)

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

payload.value:
facilitator/verify — https://x402.org (facilitator endpoint) — Verify PaymentPayload for a given PaymentRequirements
facilitator/settle — https://x402.org (facilitator endpoint) — Settle verified payment on-chain
paymentMiddleware — npm:@x402/express / @x402/hono / @x402/next / @x402/fastify — Server-side paywall middleware (1-line integration)
@x402/fetch client — npm:@x402/fetch — Client that auto-handles 402, signs, and retries
@x402/paywall — npm:@x402/paywall — Modular paywall package (v2)
python SDK — pip:x402 — Python client/server integration
Go SDK — go:github.com/x402-foundation/x402/go — Go client/server integration

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org
source.excerpt: x402 v2 launched December 11, 2025. Over 100M payments processed. Open standard built on HTTP 402. TypeScript, Python, Go SDKs. Zero protocol fees. Supported by Coinbase, Cloudflare, AWS, Stripe, Vercel, World.

payload.value: Permissionless; client-side signing with any EVM or Solana wallet; facilitator handles settlement

source.title: Introducing x402 V2 — x402.org

source.title: Skyfire Developer Documentation
source.excerpt: Skyfire enables programmatic interaction between Buyers and Sellers using a token-based identity and payment protocol. KYA+PAY tokens. Managed wallets. Live implementations at Dappier, BuildShip, Apify.
